mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market increases recession probability, triggering risk-off portfolio rebalancing and negative S&P 500 forward returns as investors price in lower future cash flows and higher default risk.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal shows no predictive power in out-of-sample rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer credit expansion combined with robust industrial production signals healthy aggregate demand, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in at least two consecutive calendar years, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation readings force the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, elevating real interest rates and compressing equity valuations, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral when both inflation and policy rates are elevated, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 50% over a 3-year test period.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands the total addressable market for corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns across a full quarterly cycle.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no statistically significant correlation with GDP growth acceleration, or the signal produces negative returns during confirmed expansionary phases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts signals weakening consumer confidence and credit availability, leading to risk aversion and negative S&P 500 forward returns as market participants anticipate a slowdown in economic activity.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite housing starts falling below the threshold, or the trigger generates a win rate below 40% over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid payroll growth coinciding with stable consumer prices indicates a healthy wage-price equilibrium, reducing stagflation fears and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns as earnings momentum accelerates without policy backlash.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns when payrolls rise and inflation remains stable, or the interaction effect reverses direction during high-volatility periods.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial output paired with rising unemployment confirms a supply-demand mismatch and capacity utilization drop, triggering defensive positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The signal produces positive forward returns during confirmed supply contractions, or the joint indicator shows no incremental predictive power over a single-series baseline over a 3-year rolling window.
